text.title: Testing with Assistive Technology Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the test matrix cover at least 2 ATs per critical flow?

branch.question: Is recording attached to every finding?

text.example: Concrete walk: Audit covers NVDA + VoiceOver + Voice Control on /checkout; Guidepup transcripts attached → publish.
